meaning: n.意识,知觉,自觉,觉悟,个人思想
examples: She banged her head and lost consciousness.
It took her a few minutes to recover consciousness.
I can't remember any more—I must have lost consciousness.
The need for embedding this Hayekian understanding of markets in the public consciousness cannot be overstated.
Is this feedback alerting our social consciousness or is it manipulating our ethics via social engineering?
